allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/@livekit/components-react/dist/index.js','utf8'\); const m=c.match\(/\\"lk-button[^\\"]+\\"/g\)||[]; console.log\([...new Set\(m\)].join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/@livekit/components-react/dist/index.js','utf8'\); const m=c.match\(/lk-button[a-z-]*/g\)||[]; const u=[...new Set\(m\)]; console.log\(u.join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "var fs=require\('fs'\); var c=fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/@livekit/components-react/dist/index.js','utf8'\); var m=c.match\(/lk-button[-a-z]*/g\)||[]; var u={}; m.forEach\(function\(x\){u[x]=1;}\); Object.keys\(u\).forEach\(function\(k\){console.log\(k\);}\)")
